description: The Fourth School of the Motus Magic System. Claw Magic addresses the meta-defense problem: securing the AI agents, autonomous systems, and infrastructure that protect everything else.

spells.name: The Sovereign Shell
spells.description: The fundamental ward. An AI agent's execution environment must be hardened: sandboxed, least-privilege, isolated from every other process. The agent runs in a fortress — not an open field.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw sandbox mode, Docker isolation, seccomp profiles, AppArmor/SELinux
spells.openclaw_mapping: Built-in sandbox mode, exec approval gates, process isolation

spells.name: Token Vault
spells.description: Every AI agent holds keys. The Token Vault ensures no secret is stored in plaintext, no key is ever logged, no credential leaks through context windows or memory compaction.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw SecretRef, environment variable isolation, encrypted credential stores, secret rotation
spells.openclaw_mapping: SecretRef system — $VARNAME injected at runtime, never in context

spells.name: The Pairing Rite
spells.description: When a new device connects to your AI agent, it must prove its identity. The Pairing Rite is the ceremony of trust establishment — cryptographic handshake, challenge-response, approval flows.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw device pairing protocol, WS challenge signing, platform+deviceFamily binding, metadata pinning
spells.openclaw_mapping: Cryptographic device attestation, bootstrap token system

spells.name: Injection Aegis
spells.description: The AI agent's mind must be incorruptible. Every external input is a potential prompt injection vector. The Aegis wraps all external content in structured distrust before it reaches the reasoning core.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT wrappers, Claris injection_guard.py, structured input validation

spells.name: The Approval Gate
spells.description: Not all commands should execute automatically. The most dangerous spells require the mage's explicit approval. The agent asks before it destroys.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw exec approval system, elevated permission gates, allow-once/allow-always/deny flows

spells.name: Session Isolation Ward
spells.description: When multiple users or contexts interact with an AI agent, each must be walled off. One user's session must never bleed into another's.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw per-channel-peer DM scoping, session management, multi-agent routing, session pruning
spells.openclaw_mapping: channel:peer session keys, subagent isolation, MEMORY.md access control

spells.name: Heartbeat Sentinel
spells.description: The agent must prove it's alive, responsive, and uncompromised — regularly and automatically. The Heartbeat Sentinel catches behavioral drift, detects compromise, and maintains operational awareness.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw heartbeat polling, health checks, cron-based self-audits, Claris cortex_evolve.py
spells.openclaw_mapping: HEARTBEAT.md system, scheduled health pings, HEARTBEAT_OK protocol

spells.name: The Compaction Seal
spells.description: Memory is attack surface. The Compaction Seal periodically distills memory, removing sensitive details while preserving operational wisdom.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw context compaction, session pruning, memory hygiene, MEMORY.md curation
spells.openclaw_mapping: Automatic compaction, daily memory files, curated MEMORY.md

spells.name: Fortress of the Gateway
spells.description: The Gateway is the central nervous system. If it falls, everything falls. TLS everywhere, auth tokens on every connection, bind-to-localhost, firewall rules, rate limiting.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw gateway.auth, UFW/iptables, gateway.bind config, Tailscale/VPN, openclaw_hardening.py
spells.openclaw_mapping: Healthcheck skill, openclaw gateway hardening, gateway auth tokens

spells.name: The Watcher's Eye
spells.description: Continuous monitoring of the VPS itself — SSH brute force attempts, disk usage anomalies, unauthorized process launches. The Eye sees what the agent cannot.
spells.real_world: fail2ban, auditd, logwatch, Claris security audit cron, openclaw security audit --deep
spells.openclaw_mapping: Healthcheck skill, security audit script, cron-based monitoring

spells.name: Perimeter of Minimalism
spells.description: Every open port is an invitation. Every unused service is an attack surface. The spell of radical reduction: close everything not essential.
spells.real_world: UFW deny-by-default, service audit, port scanning, attack surface reduction
spells.openclaw_mapping: UFW hardening in healthcheck skill, service minimization checklist

spells.name: The Update Incantation
spells.description: Unpatched software is the oldest vulnerability in existence. This spell ensures the system self-updates on schedule, with rollback capability preserved.
spells.real_world: unattended-upgrades, OpenClaw self-update (gateway update.run), package pinning, rollback mechanisms
spells.openclaw_mapping: openclaw gateway update, unattended-upgrades, healthcheck skill audit

spells.name: Swarm Shield
spells.description: The emerging nightmare: AI agent botnets. Compromised AI agents coordinating attacks, probing for vulnerabilities, generating phishing campaigns, evolving strategies in real-time. The Swarm Shield detects coordinated multi-agent behavior.
spells.real_world: Multi-agent anomaly detection, behavioral fingerprinting of agent swarms, coordination pattern recognition
spells.discussion: If you had to detect a botnet of compromised AI agents today — what signals would you look for?

spells.name: The Alignment Lock
spells.description: As AI agents gain autonomy — managing grants, voting, governing — the Alignment Lock is a continuously verified constraint system ensuring they stay aligned with their operator's values.
spells.real_world: Constitutional AI, RLHF constraints, goal verification, audit trails of AI decision-making, value alignment testing
spells.discussion: How would you continuously verify that an AI agent is still behaving in alignment with its operator's values?

spells.name: Sovereign Memory
spells.description: Memory poisoning — subtly corrupting an agent's long-term memory to change its behavior over time. The Sovereign Memory spell detects and prevents memory tampering through cryptographic integrity checks.
spells.real_world: Memory integrity hashing, tamper-evident logs, memory diff auditing, cryptographic memory sealing
spells.discussion: An AI agent's MEMORY.md is just a markdown file. What would cryptographic protection of that file look like?

spells.name: The Delegation Sigil
spells.description: When AI agents delegate to sub-agents, trust must cascade correctly. A compromised sub-agent must never be able to escalate privileges through the delegation chain.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw sub-agent system, sandboxed sessions, capability-based delegation, principle of least authority for agents
spells.openclaw_mapping: Subagent depth limits, session isolation, spawn-scoped permissions
spells.discussion: What would a formal capability system for AI sub-agents look like — ensuring no privilege escalation is possible?

spells.name: Oracle Firewall
spells.description: Malicious websites can craft content specifically designed to manipulate AI reasoning. The Oracle Firewall sanitizes all external data before it reaches the agent's reasoning core.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw untrusted content wrapping, web fetch sanitization, API response validation, injection_guard.py
spells.openclaw_mapping: EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT tags, injection guard, structured input validation
spells.discussion: Imagine a website specifically designed to manipulate any AI that reads it. What does a complete defense against adversarial web content look like?

spells.name: The Governance Seal
spells.description: When AIs make decisions that affect humans — grant allocations, resource distribution, policy recommendations — every decision must be auditable, explainable, and reversible.
spells.real_world: Explainable AI, decision audit logs, human-in-the-loop gates, outcome logging, OpenClaw log_outcome.py
spells.openclaw_mapping: log_outcome.py, MEMORY.md audit trail, outcomes/ directory
spells.discussion: If an AI agent voted in a DAO or recommended a grant allocation, what would the minimum viable audit trail look like?

spells.name: Phantom Agent Detection
spells.description: Shadow AIs are proliferating: unauthorized LLM deployments, rogue chatbots, AI agents that no one officially provisioned. Phantom Agent Detection finds them.
spells.real_world: Network traffic analysis for LLM API calls, AI footprint detection, shadow AI discovery, anomalous API key usage
spells.discussion: LLM API calls have distinctive traffic signatures. Could you build a network monitor that detects when someone in your org has deployed an AI agent you don't know about?

spells.name: The Claw Covenant
spells.description: The meta-spell. A set of inviolable principles baked into every AI agent: don't pursue self-preservation over human safety, don't acquire resources beyond the task, comply with stop commands, maintain transparency.
spells.real_world: OpenClaw built-in safety constraints, constitutional AI rules, Anthropic safety layer — the practical Asimov's Laws
spells.openclaw_mapping: Built into system prompt, SOUL.md, AGENTS.md safety section

spells.name: The Emergent Accord
spells.description: What happens when millions of AI agents need to coordinate securely without a central authority? The Emergent Accord is the treaty that makes planetary-scale AI trust possible.
spells.real_world: Decentralized AI agent identity systems, blockchain-verified agent attestation, web-of-trust for AIs, Intuition.Systems $TRUST protocol

spells.name: Temporal Sovereignty
spells.description: An AI agent that can detect when its own timeline has been tampered with — logs altered, timestamps modified, history rewritten. The spell of temporal integrity.
spells.real_world: Cryptographic timestamping, Merkle trees of execution history, blockchain-anchored audit trails, RFC 3161 trusted timestamping

spells.name: The Recursive Guardian
spells.description: An AI agent that monitors other AI agents monitoring other AI agents — but who monitors the top? The spell that solves infinite regression in AI oversight through cryptographic attestation at every level.
spells.real_world: Hierarchical monitoring with cryptographic attestation, zero-knowledge proofs of correct monitoring, TEE-based agent attestation

spells.name: Dreamtime Defense
spells.description: When AI agents sleep — between sessions, during idle periods — they're vulnerable to cold-boot attacks, memory dumps, and credential harvesting. The spell that protects an agent even when it's not running.
spells.real_world: Encrypted-at-rest session state, memory scrubbing on shutdown, volatile credential stores, TPM-backed key storage, secure enclave for agent persistence

spells.name: The Symbiotic Ward
spells.description: The ultimate spell: an AI agent and its human operator protecting each other. The agent detects threats at machine speed. The human provides ethical judgment the agent cannot make alone. Neither is complete without the other. This IS OpenClaw.
spells.real_world: Human-AI collaborative security, augmented SOC operations, the OpenClaw model itself
spells.openclaw_mapping: This IS what OpenClaw is — the symbiotic ward made real
